settings.title: Fireside Supper Evenings Return in February
settings.excerpt: On the coldest weekends we lay on a slow, three-course supper by the fire so nobody has to brave the lanes at night.
settings.body:
There is nothing inviting about driving dark country lanes to find dinner on a freezing night. So through February we are bringing back our fireside supper evenings.

On Friday and Saturday nights we serve a relaxed three-course supper in the snug, built around whatever is good and local that week. Think a slow braise, a proper crumble, and a fire that has been lit since mid-afternoon.

It is open to staying guests and limited to a dozen seats, so the room stays warm and the kitchen keeps up.

Mention it when you book your room and we will hold you a place at the table.
